summary: Iteration 33 - Complete testing of Super Admin Features Modal functionality. All requested features verified: Super Admin login to /super-admin, tenants list with tabs, features modal with 4 sections (basic, advanced, additional, settings), enable/disable features, save features, and API endpoints working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description for DialogContent - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: API health check - passed
Super Admin login (owner@maestroegp.com / owner123 / secret: 271018) - successful
Super Admin login with wrong secret key - correctly rejected (401/403)
Super Admin login with wrong password - correctly rejected (401)
GET /api/super-admin/tenants - returns 4 tenants
GET /api/super-admin/stats - returns total_tenants count
GET /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/features - returns all 4 sections (29 features total)
PUT /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/features - updates features successfully
Enable all features - works correctly
Disable all features - works correctly
Features API unauthorized access - correctly rejected
Features API invalid tenant - returns 404
Client login (hanialdujaili@gmail.com / graffiti123) - successful
Client settings endpoint - returns features
UI: Super Admin login form loads correctly
UI: Dashboard shows 3 tenants (مطعم الاختيار, Hosam Food, GRaffiti burger)
UI: Tenants list tabs visible (العملاء الفعليين, الحسابات التجريبية, الكل)
UI: Features modal opens with all 4 sections
UI: 29 Switch components found in modal
UI: تفعيل الكل and تعطيل الكل buttons present
UI: Feature toggle works correctly
UI: Save features shows success toast (تم حفظ صلاحيات العميل)
critical_code_review_comments: Features modal correctly displays all 4 sections as designed
API endpoints for features (GET/PUT) work correctly with proper authentication
Switch components properly toggle feature states
Save functionality persists changes to database
Enable All / Disable All buttons work as expected
Features are properly filtered by allowed_features list in backend
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_features_modal_iter33.py - Created comprehensive test suite for features modal
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing tenants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 completed successfully. Features Modal functionality fully verified: 1) Super Admin login via /super-admin works with credentials (owner@maestroegp.com / owner123 / secret: 271018), 2) Dashboard shows 3 active tenants with tabs for filtering, 3) Features modal opens correctly showing 4 sections: الميزات الأساسية (8), الميزات المتقدمة (8), ميزات إضافية (4), خيارات الإعدادات (9), 4) Total 29 Switch components for toggling features, 5) Enable All/Disable All buttons work, 6) Save button persists changes with success toast, 7) API endpoints GET/PUT /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/features work correctly. All 14 backend tests passed. All UI tests passed via Playwright.
